Self.Wiki: Defines parameters for ammunition, covering arrows, greatarrows and bolts.

sfxId.Wiki: The arrow SFX to display when aiming this arrow.

lightBulletId0.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 0.

heavyBulletId0.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 0.

lightDamageId0.Wiki: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 0.

heavyDamageId0.Wiki: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 0.

lightBulletId1.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 1.

heavyBulletId1.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 1.

lightDamageId1.Wiki: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 1.

heavyDamageId1.Wiki: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 1.

lightBulletId2.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 2.

heavyBulletId2.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 2.

lightDamageId2.Wiki: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 2.

heavyDamageId2.Wiki: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 2.

lightBulletId3.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 3.

heavyBulletId3.Wiki: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 3.

lightDamageId3.Wiki: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 3.

heavyDamageId3.Wiki: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 3.

modelIdInQuiver.Wiki: The model ID of the arrow within the quiver.

menuPhysicalAttack.Wiki: The physical attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuMagicAttack.Wiki: The magic attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuThunderAttack.Wiki: The lightning attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuFireAttack.Wiki: The fire attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menudarkAttack.Wiki: The dark attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuPoisonAttack.Wiki: The poison attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuBleedAttack.Wiki: The bleed attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

menuWeaponBreakAttack.Wiki: The durability attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

arrowType.Wiki: The type of arrow this is.

menuAttackCategory1.Wiki: The first attack attribute for this arrow.

menuAttackCategory2.Wiki: The second attack attribute for this arrow.
